overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks past a 'Brooklyn Barista' coffee shop, continues along wet streets reflecting colorful neon signs, and stops at a crosswalk to watch futuristic vehicles pass by. The scene features high-end ray-traced graphics with vibrant pink, blue, and yellow neon lighting against dark cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk in front of Brooklyn Barista coffee shop

agents.ego_description: walking past the Brooklyn Barista coffee shop, moving away from the entrance

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing and conversing outside the coffee shop entrance

entered.detail: large neon pink sign reading 'BROOKLYN BARISTA' mounted on the building facade
futuristic escalator structure with blue neon lighting visible in the distance
wet reflective pavement showing neon light reflections

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in front of the Brooklyn Barista coffee shop in a cyberpunk city at night. The camera holder walks forward along the covered sidewalk, passing NPCs standing near the entrance. The large pink neon sign dominates the view while an escalator structure is visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with elevated transit structure

events.description: passes the escalator structure on the right, entering more open street area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet street toward the intersection, passing the escalator

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit standing near a food stall

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure with support columns spanning across the street
yellow textured safety paving along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving past the coffee shop, the camera proceeds along the wet asphalt street with the escalator structure now on the right. The elevated highway overhead becomes more prominent as the camera approaches the intersection. A pedestrian in red stands near a food stall on the right side.

events.description: approaches the yellow crosswalk as futuristic vehicles begin passing on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the intersection center

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white pants crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: bold yellow and black striped crosswalk markings on the wet asphalt
tall red industrial building with scaffolding and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the wide intersection area, stepping onto the yellow crosswalk stripes. A pedestrian in white pants crosses ahead while the elevated highway structure spans overhead. The red industrial building rises on the right as vehicles begin to appear on the wet streets.

events.description: futuristic sports car with glowing accents drives past the crosswalk
multiple vehicles pass through the intersection with headlights reflecting on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk watching traffic pass by, occasionally panning to follow vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection with bright headlights

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying a woman's face with pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the intersection crosswalk, observing the flow of futuristic vehicles driving through the neon-lit streets. A large billboard with a woman's face glows pink on the left building. Multiple cars pass by with their headlights reflecting off the wet asphalt, while the elevated highway structure spans overhead to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the intimate glow of a neon storefront into the expansive, bustling heart of a futuristic city intersection. It begins by walking past the pink neon signage of the Brooklyn Barista coffee shop and nearby pedestrians along a covered sidewalk. As the camera moves forward, the view opens up to a wet asphalt street where an escalator structure and an elevated highway become prominent features of the urban skyline. The scene then shifts into a wide intersection, stepping onto yellow crosswalk stripes past a red industrial building as the first futuristic vehicles appear. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the crosswalk to observe the flow of traffic reflecting off the rain-slicked ground beneath a glowing pink billboard and the spanning overhead highway.
